subcodes.title: Some Answered Questions #071 Spiritual Discoveries
subcodes.first_line: Spiritual disclosures are of two kinds: one, which is commonly referred to among other peoples, is mere imagination
subcodes.first_line_orig: اکتشافات روحانیه بر دو قسم است یک نوع اندکی اوهامست که مصطلح اقوام سائره است
subcodes.subjects: @power of imagination; thought; right intention, @power of the mind over nature, @mysteries and their discovery; the mystical vision, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @meaning; importance of dreams and visions
